style_summary: A casual real-life social photo transformed into a playful poster by layering original cartoon mascot stickers, hand-drawn outlines, ribbon headline panels, sparkles, spirals, and sketchy decorative marks over the photographic scene.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main person, group, product, pet, or focal object
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: main pose or action, such as leaning, posing, holding a prop, waving, sitting, listening, or celebrating
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: object, product, food, drink, book, toy, travel item, or hero prop placed in the scene
environment_variables.LOCATION: real-world environment or setting, such as garden cafe, bookstore, street market, boardwalk, classroom, studio, or transit stop
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: secondary scene details such as plants, furniture, lights, windows, shelves, railings, signage, or crowd hints
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: short hand-lettered headline inside a ribbon or sticker panel
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: optional small handwritten label, tiny caption, or repeated supporting mark; can be empty
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: decorative symbol set such as stars, spirals, web lines, hearts, arrows, sparkle marks, or comic motion lines
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: styling direction for the subject or mascot costumes, such as casual cafe outfit, travel outfit, streetwear, beachwear, school outfit, or colorful themed accessories

prompt_template:
Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} image in the "Playful Mascot Doodle Snapshot" style.

Subject: {SUBJECT}.
Subject action: {SUBJECT_ACTION}.
Product or prop: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}.
Location: {LOCATION}.
Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}.
Main text: "{MAIN_TEXT}".
Secondary text: "{SECONDARY_TEXT}".
Accent symbols: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}.
Wardrobe or styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}.

Use a realistic casual phone-photo scene as the base layer. Keep the environment photographic, naturally lit, and location-specific. Add original flat cartoon mascot stickers on top of the photo: fruit, cloud, star, cup, wave, and jelly-shaped characters with simple eyes, thick dark outlines, glossy color blocks, sunny yellow, teal, coral, sky blue, lavender, cream, and soft pink accents. Add a loose warm outline around the main subject, plus hand-drawn sparkles, spirals, web lines, stars, arrows, and marker doodles floating over the scene.

Place the main headline inside a cream or pale-yellow wavy ribbon sticker in the upper third. Use imperfect uppercase hand-lettered marker typography in dark burgundy ink. Keep the main subject's face, product, or focal object unobstructed. The result should feel like a cheerful social-media photo booth collage, not a polished corporate ad.

Avoid watermark, username, platform logo, QR code, creator signature, licensed character, recognizable franchise costume, superhero emblem, brand logo, exact reference character, copied IP, goggle-eyed capsule character, denim overalls, red-blue web-pattern suit, mask, shield, helmet emblem, tiny unreadable text, dense paragraph text, corporate layout, sterile studio render, fully vector background, 3D plush mascot, photoreal CGI mascot, dark horror mood, gritty dystopian tone, cyberpunk neon scene, face obstruction, distorted hands, and over-sharpened artificial texture.
negative_prompt: Avoid watermark, username, platform logo, QR code, creator signature, licensed character, recognizable franchise costume, superhero emblem, brand logo, exact reference character, copied IP, goggle-eyed capsule character, denim overalls, red-blue web-pattern suit, mask, shield, helmet emblem, tiny unreadable text, dense paragraph text, corporate layout, sterile studio render, fully vector background, 3D plush mascot, photoreal CGI mascot, dark horror mood, gritty dystopian tone, cyberpunk neon scene, face obstruction, distorted hands, and over-sharpened artificial texture.

values.SUBJECT: a young traveler at a leafy outdoor cafe
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: resting their cheek on one hand while smiling toward the camera
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a wooden cafe table with an iced drink and a small travel notebook
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: lush palm leaves, black metal railing, glass roof, string lights, warm wooden tables
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: tiny hello labels near the stickers
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: white corner web lines, pale yellow sparkles, pink spirals, curly marker swashes
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: casual summer cafe outfit with soft warm colors

values.SUBJECT: a street food creator at a colorful night market
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: holding up a skewer and laughing as sticker mascots gather around
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a paper tray of snacks and a bright drink cup
values.LOCATION: a lively night market food lane
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: lanterns, vendor stalls, handwritten menus, blurred crowd movement, warm lights
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: yellow stars, steam doodles, arrows, pink spirals, little comic bursts
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: playful streetwear with a colorful jacket and casual accessories

values.SUBJECT: a student browsing in an independent bookstore
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: leaning against a shelf while holding an open book
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a stack of colorful books and a bookmark
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: tall shelves, reading lamps, paper signs, warm wood floor, narrow aisles
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: sparkle stars, page-turn motion lines, small hearts, white corner doodles
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: soft campus outfit with layered casual pieces and a canvas tote

values.SUBJECT: a beach visitor sitting beside a surfboard on a boardwalk
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: tilting sunglasses while looking toward the camera
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a surfboard, a tote bag, and a cold lemonade cup
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: palm shadows, railings, ocean glimpses, beach umbrellas, warm wooden planks
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: bubble doodles, bright stars, wave lines, white corner loops, yellow swirls
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: bright beachwear with playful accessories and sun-washed colors
